SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore

Class SharedStoreMetricsSource

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.SharedStoreMetricsSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
MetricsSource
public class SharedStoreMetricsSource extends Object implements MetricsSource
Cluster-wide MetricsSource for cluster.mode=shared-store: it merges the live per-instance snapshots held in a SnapshotStore into one aggregate, using the same MetricsKpis math as every other source, so the shapes and rates are identical to local / Prometheus.

Aggregation is exact for counters (summed per API across instances) and approximate for latency (count-weighted mean, max-of-max) — acceptable for the bounded small-cluster tier. When no instance is currently reporting it falls back to this instance's local source, so the dashboard never goes dark.

Author:
Anand Manissery

    • series

      public List<SeriesPoint> series(long windowSec)
      Description copied from interface: MetricsSource
      Trend samples for the timeline chart, newest last. windowSec <= 0 means "all retained". Local mode reads the optional in-memory ring (empty when history is disabled); Prometheus mode derives a cluster-wide, reload-surviving trend from query_range.
      Specified by:
      series in interface MetricsSource

    • instances

      public List<InstanceMetrics> instances()
      Returns per-instance metrics from the shared store only. The dashboard host's own local registry is not included — instances are the remote failover services that push snapshots, not the dashboard itself.
      Specified by:
      instances in interface MetricsSource
      Returns:
      per-instance metrics; never null; at least one element in any active source
